'''ngomadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hoar|hoar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-m-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hoar|hoar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngomadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngomadhithi|ngomadhithi]] || [[word:ngomadhiji|ngomadhiji]] || [[word:ngomadhishi|ngomadhishi]] || [[word:ngomadhiki|ngomadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngomadhuthuthu|ngomadhuthuthu]] || [[word:ngomadhujuju|ngomadhujuju]] || [[word:ngomadhushushu|ngomadhushushu]] || [[word:ngomadhukuku|ngomadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngomadhuthu|ngomadhuthu]] || [[word:ngomadhuju|ngomadhuju]] || [[word:ngomadhushu|ngomadhushu]] || [[word:ngomadhuku|ngomadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngomadhufthuf|ngomadhufthuf]] || [[word:ngomadhufjuf|ngomadhufjuf]] || [[word:ngomadhufshuf|ngomadhufshuf]] || [[word:ngomadhufkuf|ngomadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngomadhethe|ngomadhethe]] || [[word:ngomadheje|ngomadheje]] || [[word:ngomadheshe|ngomadheshe]] || [[word:ngomadheke|ngomadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngomadhothotho|ngomadhothotho]] || [[word:ngomadhojojo|ngomadhojojo]] || [[word:ngomadhoshosho|ngomadhoshosho]] || [[word:ngomadhokoko|ngomadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngomadhotho|ngomadhotho]] || [[word:ngomadhojo|ngomadhojo]] || [[word:ngomadhosho|ngomadhosho]] || [[word:ngomadhoko|ngomadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngomadhofthof|ngomadhofthof]] || [[word:ngomadhofjof|ngomadhofjof]] || [[word:ngomadhofshof|ngomadhofshof]] || [[word:ngomadhofkof|ngomadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngomadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŠthĂŠ|ngomadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŠjĂŠ|ngomadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŠshĂŠ|ngomadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngomadhĂŠkĂŠ|ngomadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngomadhathatha|ngomadhathatha]] || [[word:ngomadhajaja|ngomadhajaja]] || [[word:ngomadhashasha|ngomadhashasha]] || [[word:ngomadhakaka|ngomadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngomadhatha|ngomadhatha]] || [[word:ngomadhaja|ngomadhaja]] || [[word:ngomadhasha|ngomadhasha]] || [[word:ngomadhaka|ngomadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngomadhafthaf|ngomadhafthaf]] || [[word:ngomadhafjaf|ngomadhafjaf]] || [[word:ngomadhafshaf|ngomadhafshaf]] || [[word:ngomadhafkaf|ngomadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngomadhasha|ngomadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngomadhshĂ«sha|ngomadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngomadhrosha|ngomadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngomadhmusha|ngomadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngomadhyasha|ngomadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongomadhnkshĂ«sha|gongomadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongomadhnkrosha|gongomadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongomadhnkmusha|gongomadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongomadhnkyasha|gongomadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngomamadhasha|ngomamadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngomamadhshĂ«sha|ngomamadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngomamadhrosha|ngomamadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngomamadhmusha|ngomamadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngomamadhyasha|ngomamadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongomamadhnkshĂ«sha|gongomamadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongomamadhnkrosha|gongomamadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongomamadhnkmusha|gongomamadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongomamadhnkyasha|gongomamadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngemĂŠdhasha|ngemĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngemĂŠdhshĂ«sha|ngemĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngemĂŠdhrosha|ngemĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngemĂŠdhmusha|ngemĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngemĂŠdhyasha|ngemĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongemĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gongemĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongemĂŠdhnkrosha|gongemĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongemĂŠdhnkmusha|gongemĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongemĂŠdhnkyasha|gongemĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngomfadhasha|ngomfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngomfadhshĂ«sha|ngomfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngomfadhrosha|ngomfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngomfadhmusha|ngomfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngomfadhyasha|ngomfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongomfadhnkshĂ«sha|gongomfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongomfadhnkrosha|gongomfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongomfadhnkmusha|gongomfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongomfadhnkyasha|gongomfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
